message:
feat(robot): add TOON output format for token-efficient agent communication

Add --robot-format toon option that pipes JSON through the tru binary
for Token-Optimized Object Notation output. TOON provides 15-27% token
savings for search results, making agent communication more efficient.

Key changes:
- Add Toon variant to RobotFormat enum
- Implement TOON output in output_robot_results() with tru binary piping
- Add CASS_OUTPUT_FORMAT env var for format selection
- Add TOON_DEFAULT_FORMAT env var as fallback
- Add 8 integration tests for TOON functionality
- Graceful fallback to JSON if tru binary unavailable

Environment variable precedence:
CLI --robot-format > CASS_OUTPUT_FORMAT > TOON_DEFAULT_FORMAT > default

Closes: bd-3ft, bd-2f7, bd-365, bd-16c

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
